problem:
What is a stack trace, and how can I use it to debug my application errors?.

Sometimes when I run my application it gives me an error that looks like:

Exception in thread "main" java.lang.NullPointerException
        at com.example.myproject.Book.getTitle(Book.java:16)
        at com.example.myproject.Author.getBookTitles(Author.java:25)
        at com.example.myproject.Bootstrap.main(Bootstrap.java:14)

People have referred to this as a "stack trace".
memory_hint:
This is a known recurring issue. The temporary fix is: What is a stack trace, and how can I use it to debug my application errors?.

In simple terms, a stack trace is a list of the method calls that the application was in the middle of . This works for now but you will need to apply it again when the issue returns.
